# Civic Docs

> Civic is a security layer for AI agents. It provides a hosted MCP gateway (Civic Hub) with 85 MCP servers, guardrails, audit logs, instant revocation, and secret management — so AI agents can call real-world tools safely. Civic Auth is a separate product for adding user authentication (email, Google, Web3 wallets) to web apps.

## Getting Started with Civic (MCP Hub)

- [Get Started](https://docs.civic.com/civic/quickstart): Sign up, get a token, make a first tool call in under 10 minutes
- [Civic Control Plane (Chat)](https://docs.civic.com/civic/quickstart/civic-chat): Configure toolkits, query audit logs, revoke access via natural language at app.civic.com
- [Credentials & URL Parameters](https://docs.civic.com/civic/quickstart/credentials): MCP URL, toolkit params, token generation
- [Agent Deployment](https://docs.civic.com/civic/quickstart/clients/agents): Profile locking, URL params, skills pre-loading, authentication for autonomous agents
- [Client Compatibility](https://docs.civic.com/civic/reference/client-compatibility): Full matrix of supported clients and connection methods

## Connecting Your Agent or Client

### Agent Frameworks & SDKs

- [Anthropic SDK](https://docs.civic.com/civic/recipes/anthropic): Native MCP connector via the Anthropic Messages API (beta header required)
- [OpenAI Agents SDK](https://docs.civic.com/civic/recipes/openai-agents): hostedMcpTool() for zero-boilerplate agent setup
- [OpenAI SDK](https://docs.civic.com/civic/recipes/openai-sdk): Manual function calling with full tool loop control
- [LangChain / LangGraph](https://docs.civic.com/civic/recipes/langchain): MultiServerMCPClient with streamable_http transport
- [Vercel AI SDK](https://docs.civic.com/civic/recipes/vercel-ai-sdk): Next.js streaming apps with MCP tool integration
- [Pydantic AI](https://docs.civic.com/civic/recipes/python-pydantic): MCPServerStreamableHTTP transport
- [Google ADK](https://docs.civic.com/civic/recipes/google-adk): Google Agent Developer Kit integration
- [CrewAI](https://docs.civic.com/civic/recipes/crewai): Multi-agent workflows
- [AutoGen](https://docs.civic.com/civic/recipes/autogen): Microsoft AutoGen integration
- [LlamaIndex](https://docs.civic.com/civic/recipes/llamaindex): LlamaIndex agent integration
- [Mastra](https://docs.civic.com/civic/recipes/mastra): TypeScript agent framework
- [Semantic Kernel](https://docs.civic.com/civic/recipes/semantic-kernel): Microsoft Semantic Kernel
- [Haystack](https://docs.civic.com/civic/recipes/haystack): deepset Haystack pipelines
- [DSPy](https://docs.civic.com/civic/recipes/dspy): Stanford DSPy
- [Agno](https://docs.civic.com/civic/recipes/agno): Agno framework
- [CAMEL-AI](https://docs.civic.com/civic/recipes/camel-ai): CAMEL-AI framework
- [SmolagAgents](https://docs.civic.com/civic/recipes/smolagents): HuggingFace smolagents
- [Flowise](https://docs.civic.com/civic/recipes/flowise): No-code Flowise integration
- [Dify](https://docs.civic.com/civic/recipes/dify): Dify platform integration
- [Deep Agents](https://docs.civic.com/civic/recipes/deepagents): Deep Agents integration

### Interactive Clients

- [Claude Desktop](https://docs.civic.com/civic/quickstart/clients/claude-desktop): 2-minute setup
- [Claude.ai (Web)](https://docs.civic.com/civic/quickstart/clients/claude-web): 2-minute setup
- [VS Code](https://docs.civic.com/civic/quickstart/clients/vscode): GitHub Copilot MCP integration
- [Cursor](https://docs.civic.com/civic/quickstart/clients/cursor): 3-minute setup
- [Windsurf](https://docs.civic.com/civic/quickstart/clients/windsurf): Native Streamable HTTP
- [JetBrains IDEs](https://docs.civic.com/civic/quickstart/clients/jetbrains): Via mcp-remote bridge (Node 20+)
- [Gemini CLI](https://docs.civic.com/civic/quickstart/clients/gemini): httpUrl field in settings.json
- [Codex](https://docs.civic.com/civic/quickstart/clients/codex): OpenAI Codex CLI
- [Goose](https://docs.civic.com/civic/quickstart/clients/goose): Block's open-source agent
- [Mistral LeChat](https://docs.civic.com/civic/quickstart/clients/mistral-lechat): Direct connector

## Security Concepts

- [Guardrails Overview](https://docs.civic.com/civic/concepts/guardrails): 14 built-in guardrails (4 request-blocking, 7 response-redaction, 3 transforms)
- [Request Guardrails](https://docs.civic.com/civic/concepts/guardrails/request): Block PII, credit cards, SSN, prompt injection before tool executes
- [Response Redaction](https://docs.civic.com/civic/concepts/guardrails/redaction): Redact PII, emails, IPs, phone numbers, SSNs from responses
- [Blocking Guardrails](https://docs.civic.com/civic/concepts/guardrails/blocking): Block specific tool calls entirely
- [Parameter Guardrails](https://docs.civic.com/civic/concepts/guardrails/parameters): Restrict tool parameter values
- [Transform Guardrails](https://docs.civic.com/civic/concepts/guardrails/transforms): JSON to CSV, remove/retain fields
- [Audit & Observability](https://docs.civic.com/civic/concepts/audit): Every tool call logged — tool name, params, response, timestamp, agent identity; ~30-day retention; query via Civic Chat
- [Revocation & Kill Switch](https://docs.civic.com/civic/concepts/revocation): Instant revocation at 4 levels — tool, server operations, server, entire toolkit
- [Secret Management](https://docs.civic.com/civic/concepts/secret-management): Civic stores OAuth tokens and API keys; secrets never exposed to AI agent
- [Prompt Injection Protection](https://docs.civic.com/civic/concepts/prompt-injection): Detect and block prompt injection attacks
- [Hooks](https://docs.civic.com/civic/concepts/hooks): Middleware layer around MCP tool calls
- [Security Reference](https://docs.civic.com/civic/reference/security): Security architecture and threat model

## Connectivity & Configuration

- [MCP Servers (all 85)](https://docs.civic.com/civic/reference/servers): Full list of available servers — Google Workspace, CRM, databases, finance, analytics, dev tools, communication
- [Agent Toolkits](https://docs.civic.com/civic/concepts/toolkits): Create focused groups of MCP servers; switch between them; one active at a time
- [Skills](https://docs.civic.com/civic/concepts/skills): Reusable AI capabilities that layer instructions on top of a toolkit without replacing it
- [Tools, Resources & Prompts](https://docs.civic.com/civic/concepts/tools-resources-prompts): MCP primitives reference
- [What is MCP?](https://docs.civic.com/civic/concepts/mcp): Beginner's guide to the Model Context Protocol
- [Connection Methods](https://docs.civic.com/civic/concepts/connection-methods): Streamable HTTP vs legacy options
- [Organizations](https://docs.civic.com/civic/organizations): Multi-account and team management

## Authentication & Authorization

- [OAuth & Civic Tokens](https://docs.civic.com/civic/concepts/tokens): Two auth methods — OAuth flow for interactive clients, bearer tokens for agents
- [OAuth Reference](https://docs.civic.com/civic/concepts/oauth): OAuth 2.0 implementation details
- [Authorizations Reference](https://docs.civic.com/civic/reference/authorizations): Scopes and permission model
- [Integration Overview](https://docs.civic.com/civic/developers/integration/overview): Embedding Civic in your own app

## Plans & Support

- [Billing](https://docs.civic.com/civic/billing): Free trial (10,000 credits, 14 days); paid plans from $25/mo
- [Changelog](https://docs.civic.com/civic/changelog): Latest updates
- [Troubleshooting](https://docs.civic.com/civic/troubleshooting): Common setup issues

---

## Civic Auth (User Authentication)

> Civic Auth is a separate product for adding authentication to web and mobile apps. Currently in beta. Supports email, Google, and Web3 wallet sign-in with optional embedded wallets on Solana and EVM chains.

- [Getting Started](https://docs.civic.com/auth): Install @civic/auth, get a Client ID from auth.civic.com
- [React](https://docs.civic.com/integration/react): React integration guide
- [Next.js](https://docs.civic.com/integration/nextjs): Next.js integration guide
- [Node.js](https://docs.civic.com/integration/nodejs): Node.js integration guide
- [Python](https://docs.civic.com/integration/python): FastAPI, Flask, Django
- [React Native](https://docs.civic.com/integration/mobile/react-native): Mobile integration
- [Vanilla JS](https://docs.civic.com/integration/vanillajs): Plain JavaScript integration
- [Embedded Wallets](https://docs.civic.com/web3/embedded-wallets): Automatic Web3 wallet creation for users
- [Solana](https://docs.civic.com/web3/solana): Solana wallet integration
- [Ethereum / EVM](https://docs.civic.com/web3/ethereum-evm): EVM chain support (Base, Polygon, Arbitrum, BSC, Ethereum)
- [Authentication Flows](https://docs.civic.com/overview/authentication-flows): How sign-in flows work
- [Login Options](https://docs.civic.com/overview/login-options): Email, Google, wallet options
- [Pricing](https://docs.civic.com/overview/pricing): Auth pricing
- [AI Prompts](https://docs.civic.com/ai-prompts/overview): Copy-paste prompts for AI-assisted integration

---

## Civic Labs (Experimental)

> Civic Labs is where Civic explores ideas in digital identity, agentic AI, and authorization. Projects are presented as "flasks" at various stages of development.

- [Labs Overview](https://docs.civic.com/labs): Introduction to Civic Labs
- [MCP Hub](https://docs.civic.com/labs/projects/mcp-hub): Hosted MCP manager unifying multiple servers with auth and security
- [Guardrail Proxy](https://docs.civic.com/labs/projects/guardrail-proxy): Wrap any MCP server in a configurable security layer
- [Bodyguard](https://docs.civic.com/labs/projects/bodyguard): LLM-based threat detection for prompts and tool calls
- [Pass-through Proxy](https://docs.civic.com/labs/projects/passthrough-proxy): Middleware hook system for MCP servers
- [Civic Knowledge](https://docs.civic.com/labs/projects/civic-knowledge): AI assistant for internal operations
- [x402-mcp](https://docs.civic.com/labs/projects/x402-mcp): x402 payment protocol for MCP
- [Concepts: MCP](https://docs.civic.com/labs/concepts/mcp): What is MCP and why it matters
- [Concepts: Guardrails](https://docs.civic.com/labs/concepts/guardrails): Guardrails as a protection layer
- [Concepts: Auth Strategies](https://docs.civic.com/labs/concepts/auth-strategies): OAuth2, granular permissions, consent
- [Concepts: Prompt Injection](https://docs.civic.com/labs/concepts/prompt-injection): Understanding prompt injection and LLM safety
- [Concepts: Hooks](https://docs.civic.com/labs/concepts/hooks): Middleware layer around MCP APIs
- [Concepts: RAG](https://docs.civic.com/labs/concepts/rag): Retrieval strategies for LLMs
- [Flask Status](https://docs.civic.com/labs/flask-status): Development stage definitions
- [Feedback & Contribution](https://docs.civic.com/labs/feedback): How to contribute to Labs projects
